rationale: The citing paper references Tirunillai and Tellis (2014) only in a grouped literature citation about prior text-based UGC research that extracts consumer perceptions from user-generated text. It does not assign this specific paper a distinct role in theory development, hypothesis construction, or method design. The focal methods in the citing study (CNN image classification and transformer-based language models) are developed and motivated independently rather than as a direct extension or application of the cited paper.
